title: Developmental concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
examination.rationale: Directly supports age-specific developmental milestone assessment, parent history, observation, screening, and documentation in the stated population.
examination.evidence_extract: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

exact_section.heading: 1. Standard Scope; 3.1 History Components; 3.2 Comprehensive Physical Examination

investigations.text: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports birth, feeding, medical, hearing, vision, growth, and developmental milestone review.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

investigations.text: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports parent concern, walking, speech, social, developmental-screening, and referral documentation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.

exact_section.heading: Appendix 5 — Developmental Delays Screening; Appendix 6 — Normal Developmental Milestones

investigations.text: Requires effective record keeping and documentation of screening findings, caregiver education, consent, and refusal.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports documented caregiver education and screening or referral records.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires effective record keeping and documentation of screening findings, caregiver education, consent, and refusal.

additions.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
additions.rationale: Directly supports age-specific developmental milestone assessment, parent history, observation, screening, and documentation in the stated population.
additions.evidence_extract: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

source_limitations: The source is limited to ages 1 month through 6 years and preventive screening rather than diagnosis.
Regression, seizures, safeguarding, school performance, fixed monitoring intervals, and the legacy developmental-delay diagnosis label remain unsupported by the reviewed exact sections.
The exact AAP report could not be directly opened and was not used.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
